category.scope_note: Solar PV inverter compliance comparison for Algeria export.

title.en: China-to-Algeria Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入阿尔及利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入阿爾及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Algeria IANOR NA standards, IEC 62109 adoption, CREG regulatory framework, Sonelgaz grid-connection requirements, large-scale solar tender technical specifications, and 50 Hz / 230–400 V system requirements — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与阿尔及利亚IANOR NA标准、IEC 62109采标、CREG监管框架、Sonelgaz并网要求、大型太阳能招标技术规格及50 Hz / 230–400 V系统要求差距对照，对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與阿爾及利亞IANOR NA標準、IEC 62109採標、CREG監管框架、Sonelgaz併網要求、大型太陽能招標技術規格及50 Hz / 230–400 V系統要求差距對照，對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IANOR scope determination, CREG licence decision, Sonelgaz grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Algeria IANOR, CREG, Sonelgaz, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IANOR适用范围裁定、CREG许可决定、Sonelgaz并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿尔及利亚IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IANOR適用範圍裁定、CREG許可決定、Sonelgaz併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿爾及利亞IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Algeria, the primary compliance pathway involves IANOR NA standards adopting IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 for inverter safety, CREG regulatory authorisation for power generation projects, Sonelgaz grid-connection technical requirements for the 50 Hz / 230–400 V Algerian grid, IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance, and IEC 62920 EMC evidence. Algeria's Solar 1000 and subsequent large-scale solar tenders impose project-specific technical specifications and local-content rules. Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 are not automatically accepted as Algeria evidence; supplementary IEC-route test reports and an Algeria-specific Sonelgaz grid settings sheet are required.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口阿尔及利亚时，主要合规路径包括：采标IEC 62109-1/2的IANOR NA逆变器安全标准、CREG对发电项目的监管授权、Sonelgaz针对阿尔及利亚50 Hz / 230–400 V电网的并网技术要求、IEC 62116防孤岛合规，以及IEC 62920电磁兼容证据。阿尔及利亚Solar 1000及后续大型太阳能招标规定了项目特定技术规格和本地化内容规则。中国GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024不被自动认可为阿尔及利亚证据；需提供补充IEC路径测试报告及阿尔及利亚特定的Sonelgaz并网设置表。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口阿爾及利亞時，主要合規路徑包括：採標IEC 62109-1/2的IANOR NA逆變器安全標準、CREG對發電項目的監管授權、Sonelgaz針對阿爾及利亞50 Hz / 230–400 V電網的併網技術要求、IEC 62116防孤島合規，以及IEC 62920電磁兼容證據。阿爾及利亞Solar 1000及後續大型太陽能招標規定了項目特定技術規格和本地化內容規則。中國GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024不被自動認可為阿爾及利亞證據；需提供補充IEC路徑測試報告及阿爾及利亞特定的Sonelgaz併網設定表。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
